message:
✨ Add sparkline tooltips and CSS hover tooltips to widget code generator (#1117)

Widget code generator now produces Übersicht widgets with:
- CSS-based hover tooltips (title attrs don't work in Übersicht WebKit)
- Sparkline SVG tooltip on guide name hover showing pass/fail trend
- Clickable dots that open GitHub Actions runs via run('open URL')
- Clickable acronyms that open workflow pages
- Tooltip classes: .tip-wrap (acronym), .dot-tip-wrap (dots), .spark-tip-wrap (sparkline)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
